title: Six Years at Amazon & AWS
body:
Three orgs, three problem spaces, one constant: I don't just build features — I define how systems should work, set the standards others ship against, and make sure the architecture holds when the next ten teams build on top of it.

三个组织，三段截然不同的经历，但贯穿始终的是同一件事：不只是交付功能，而是去定义系统的走向、立下别人发布时要对齐的标准，确保架构在后来者不断叠加的时候依然稳得住。

Amazon Quick Suite — Senior SDE (2025–present)

Own the data connector infrastructure behind Amazon Quick Suite — the service that lets enterprise customers pull unstructured data from dozens of sources into a unified pipeline for AI agents.

  • Redesigned & rewrote the Kendra Data Connector crawling pipeline end-to-end. This architecture now serves as the core datasource infra for all Amazon Amazon Quick Suite customers.
  • Re-architected network and event-driven connectors — eliminated customer network overhead entirely for S3, cut sync latency by ~95%.
  • Designed and shipped S3 cross-account access — one connector, multiple AWS accounts, one datasource — driving cross-team alignment on credential retrieval and access control across org boundaries.
  • Established the org-wide production-readiness standards bar for event-driven connectors: a connector has to enforce ACL end-to-end to launch.

这一段做了什么

简单说，就是给 Amazon Quick Suite 这个 AI 产品搭数据管道。企业客户的数据散落在 S3、SharePoint、Confluence、各种数据库里，我的工作是把它们统一接进来，让 AI 智能体能查到、能用上。

最大的项目是把 Kendra 的爬取管道从头设计并重写了一遍，后来这套东西直接成了 Amazon Quick Suite 所有客户的数据源底座。重做了 S3 连接器，客户端网络开销归零，同步延迟砍掉 95%。跨账户访问是另一个硬骨头——一个连接器要能打通多个 AWS 账户的 S3 桶，难点在于跨团队协调凭证和权限。最后在组织层面定了事件驱动连接器的上线标准门槛：必须全面妥善处理ACL才能上线。

Amazon One — SDE II (2022–2025)

Technical lead for Amazon One's palm-based identity platform.

  • Architected the SDK powering physical access control across 20+ data centers and corporate sites.
  • Designed FIDO-based palm biometric authentication for web login.
  • Re-architected biometric matching and enrollment for unbounded horizontal scalability.
  • Represented the product at 10+ AWS Summits (Las Vegas, Philadelphia, Dubai) — the only engineer in the org invited to re:Invent for the product launch — presenting architecture and integration strategy to enterprise executives.

这一段做了什么

Amazon One 就是那个刷手掌开门、刷掌支付的产品。我是 SDK 的技术负责人，设计了门禁系统的后端架构，部署到了二十多个数据中心和办公楼。还做了基于 FIDO 的掌纹网页登录，把生物特征匹配系统重新设计成可以无限水平扩展的架构。

除了写代码，还飞了十几个城市参加 AWS Summit，在拉斯维加斯、费城、迪拜给企业高管做产品演示和架构讲解。是整个大组里唯一被邀请去 re:Invent 参加产品宣发的工程师。

Amazon Physical Stores Tech — SDE I (2020–2022)

Built pricing, checkout, and ordering systems for Amazon's physical stores — SRS, Aries (UK), Fresh, Kaspian, and Just Walk Out.

  • Designed the 3-tier pricing strategy for UK stores — 500K+ price checks and 78K orders with zero post-launch bugs.
  • Migrated the pricing platform from daemon polling to event-driven updates — cache latency from 7 hours to 10 seconds.
  • Built a self-service pricing dashboard that cut ~250 support tickets a year.

这一段做了什么

毕业后第一份工作，给亚马逊的线下门店写定价、结账和下单系统，覆盖书店、无人商店、生鲜店等好几种业态。给英国门店设计了三级定价方案，上线后跑了五十万次价格查询和七八万笔订单，零 bug。把定价平台从老旧的轮询架构迁到事件驱动，缓存延迟从七小时降到十秒。还做了个自助排查工具，值班的人和业务方可以自己查定价问题，一年少了二百五十个工单
